• Bug Tracker
  • ID 474757

Bug ID 474757: OpenSSL DTLS vulnerabilities CVE-2014-3505, CVE-2014-3506, and CVE-2014-3507, OpenSSL vulnerability CVE-2014-3508, OpenSSL vulnerability CVE-2014-3510, TLS vulnerability CVE-2014-3511.

Last Modified: Jan 29, 2026

Affected Product(s):  See more info
BIG-IP All, LTM(all modules)

Opened: Aug 06, 2014
Vulnerability Severity: High
CVE: CVE-2014-3508, CVE-2014-5139, CVE-2014-3509, CVE-2014-3505, CVE-2014-3506, CVE-2014-3507, CVE-2014-3510, CVE-2014-3511, CVE-2014-3512
Related Article: K15573
